data.name: The Femdom Facesitting War
data.detailed_description:
This game takes place the day after the events of "My Mentally Unstable Streamer Girlfriend Is an Abusive Sadist"

Your girlfriend, Sachiko, is rapidly rising the ranks of Streamerly, the most popular streamer site in the world. However, the current number 1 streamer, Rivas, sabotages Sachiko by creating a facesitting giveaway, and in order to enter her facesitting giveaway, you can't be following Sachiko, resulting in Sachiko losing a ton of followers and halting her rise to the top. In order to continue her quest to rise to the top of Streamerly's rankings, Sachiko decides to do a facesitting giveaway of her own, but rigging it so that you, her secret boyfriend, will win. The two of you have to work together to ensure that no one finds out what you've done. If your actions are discovered, your loyalties will be tested, and just like that, the facesitting war between your girlfriend and her rival has begun.

This game is a fetish game for masochists and BDSM enjoyers that contains femdom (female domination) themes such as facesitting and sex with women on top. The story also contains heavy and sensitive themes such as death and murder

Sachiko is your sadistic, mentally unstable streamer girlfriend who's passionate about streaming and very competitive. She's a yandere that genuinely loves you, but her sadistic urges causes her to express her love in violent and sadistic ways.

Rivas is the most popular streamer on Streamerly. Her narcissism causes her to attempt to sabotage Sachiko out of fear of being surpassed in popularity.

Tori from "Dominated by Sadistic Rich Trio" makes a short cameo in this story

  • 20K+ words

  • 6 Unique endings

  • 73 Unique character images

  • 99 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

  • This game is mainly a kinetic novel that should be read as a traditional novel with images, music, sound effects, and visual effects. It has a few choices that change dialogue and some choices that lead you down several different paths that lead to 6 unique ending

  • Estimated playtime to achieve all 6 endings is 50-80 minutes depending on reading speed

data.short_description: Your girlfriend, Sachiko, decides to rig a facesitting giveaway and make you win in order to boost her stream viewership. However, her rival, Rivas, won't let Sachiko overtake her as the number 1 streamer. And so, the facesitting war beetween Sachiko and Rivas begins
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
